---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Courses taught by group members"
---

::: {.snuc-org-hero .compact}
<div class="snuc-org-hero-content">
<div class="snuc-eyebrow">Education</div>
<h1>Teaching</h1>
<p class="lead">Courses on social network analysis, statistical network models, and computational methods, taught by group members.</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.snuc-cards}
<div class="snuc-card">
### Statistical Network Analysis
**SOL3111** · Master in Sociology, Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile

Instructor: Alejandro Espinosa-Rada, Assistant Professor.
</div>

<div class="snuc-card">
### Social Networks
**SOL160** · Bachelor in Sociology, Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile

Instructor: Alejandro Espinosa-Rada, Assistant Professor.
</div>
:::
